revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-420

A condition of vision in which there is discomfort or a reduction in the ability to see significant objects, or both, due to an unsuitable distribution or range of luminance or to extreme contrasts in space or time.

Reference: C.I.E.


Note: Glare may be direct or indirect and may sometimes be produced by specular reflection.

{{IALAFooter}}
